Teacher's Day
Unit 5 · Lesson 4 · pp.135–137
🎯 Objective: Talk about Teacher's Day using simple past (baked, drew, wrote, played…) & pronounce the -ed ending: /t/ · /d/ · /ɪd/
🔊 Let's Pronounce -ed (p.137):  /t/: baked · talked · asked  |  /d/: played · hugged · danced  |  /ɪd/: waited · counted · decorated · wanted · prepared

🔤 Sort -ed Endings — Let's Pronounce (p.137)
👆 Step 1: Tap a word  ·  Step 2: Tap its -ed sound group
/t/ after voiceless sounds (k, p, s, f, sh, ch)  |  /d/ after voiced sounds (b, g, l, m, n, v, z)  |  /ɪd/ after t or d
No word selected — tap one!
/t/ baked
/d/ played
/ɪd/ waited
